app.name: CCG Workflow
app.one_liner: A multi-model AI collaboration development system where Claude orchestrates Codex for backend tasks and Gemini for frontend tasks, enforcing secure patch-based code changes with zero-config routing.

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Provide command-line access to 29+ AI-assisted development workflows including planning, coding, git operations, and code review.

rust_commands.name: apply_patch
rust_commands.purpose: Apply a reviewed code patch generated by external models after validation by Claude.

rust_commands.name: review_patch
rust_commands.purpose: Have Claude review a patch returned by an external model before allowing application.

rust_commands.name: route_task
rust_commands.purpose: Automatically delegate frontend tasks to Gemini and backend tasks to Codex based on task type.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build patch generation and review pipeline
week 1: Implement core task routing logic between Claude, Codex, and Gemini
week 1: Integrate pre-compiled codeagent-wrapper binaries for cross-platform support
acceptance_tests: All patches from external models are reviewed by Claude before being applied.
Given a backend task, the system routes it to Codex and returns a valid patch.
Given a frontend task, the system routes it to Gemini and returns a valid patch.
The CLI successfully installs and runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows using pre-compiled binaries.
VSCode plugin correctly triggers ccg commands without failure.
